# `aube rebuild`

- **Usage**: `aube rebuild [PACKAGE]‚Ä¶`
- **Aliases**: `rb`

Re-run root lifecycle scripts and allowlisted dependency builds

## Arguments

### `[PACKAGE]‚Ä¶`

Optional package names. When supplied, only matching deps' scripts run; the root lifecycle hooks (preinstall, install, postinstall, prepare) are skipped. Match is by graph `name`, not by `dep_path`. The active `allowBuilds` / `onlyBuiltDependencies` policy is bypassed for the named deps ‚Äî naming the package is the explicit opt-in
